/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libspikehat_sim.dylib -install_name @rpath/libspikehat_sim.dylib CMakeFiles/spikehat_sim.dir/src/sim_spikehat.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/kuboaki/.pyenv/versions/3.12.3/lib/python3.12/site-packages/mujoco/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/kuboaki/.pyenv/versions/3.12.3/lib/python3.12/site-packages/mujoco /Users/kuboaki/.pyenv/versions/3.12.3/lib/python3.12/site-packages/mujoco/libmujoco.3.8.1.dylib -lpthread -lm
